revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with ' {{Navbox | name = Izanagi Faith | title = Izanami and Izanagi in shinto | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Izanagi]] * [[Izanami]] |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Taga-taisha]] * [[Izanagi Shrine]] |group3 = Branch shrines |list3= * [[Eda Shrine]] * [[Kumano Hayatama Taisha]] * {{Interlanguage link|Mitsumine Shrine|ja|三峯神社}} }}<noinclude> [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>'
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Izanagi_Faith]]

Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
